user.title: SkyCooker Configuration
user.description: Please enter your SkyCooker device details.

abort.no_devices:
No SkyCooker devices found.

💡 Check:
1. Device is powered on and in pairing mode
2. Bluetooth adapter is working
3. Device is within range (3-5 meters)
4. Try restarting the device
